## Summary

Describe the intent of this pull request and the problem it solves.

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Improvement
- [ ] Internal change

## User-Visible Changes

List the changes a user can notice in the app, if any.

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran.

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] End-to-end tests
- [ ] Manual verification

## UI Evidence

Attach screenshots or recordings when the UI changes.

## Breaking Changes

State any breaking change explicitly. If there are none, write `None`.

## PR Title

Use a Conventional Commit style title, for example:

- `feat(rhythm): improve routine creation`
- `fix(ui): repair mobile landscape layout`

If squash merge is enabled, the final PR title must remain a valid Conventional Commit because it becomes the commit message on `main`.
